chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 325 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 22.05.2024 M/s Shabbir Ali Bozdar and Badaruddin Memon, Advocates for petitioner. Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for respondents No.4 & 5. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statements / comments have been filed on behalf of respondents No.3, 4, 5, 6 and 7, taken on record. Zafar Iqbal, Additional Director, Local Government Department, Khairpur (respondent No.3) and Abdul Ghani, Secretary, Union Council Noorpur, Taluka Kingri, District Khairpur (respondent No.7) are present and undertake that petitioner would be given joining within a week, and all his past salaries would be paid to him including cost of this petition amounting to Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) without fail within a period of one month. Petitioner and his Counsel are satisfied, and this petition is accordingly disposed of. In case of non-compliance, both the officials, present in the Court, would be exposed to contempt proceedings without further notice. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
